title: NRMA Ocean Beach Holiday Resort
description: Casual beachfront resort with outdoor pools, a water park & a cafe, plus tennis & a playground.
address: 90 Sydney Ave, Umina Beach NSW 2257, Australia
hotelDescription:
On Umina Beach, and overlooking Broken Bay, this down-to-earth resort is 4 km from the Mount Ettalong Lookout and 17 km from the Barrenjoey Lighthouse.
 Accommodations range from airy permanent tents with kitchenettes, bunk beds, and verandas with BBQs, to 2-bedroom treehouses, and 3-bedroom villas offering bay views. All provide flat-screens and air-conditioning.
 There’s a low-key cafe and BBQ grills, as well as a TV lounge with games. Other amenities include direct beach access, heated outdoor pools, and a water park, as well as tennis courts, bike rentals and a playground. Entertainment, guest laundry facilities and campsites are available.

title: Shelly Beach Holiday Park
description: Laid-back beach hotel offering bright cabins with kitchens, plus a water park & an outdoor pool.
address: 2 Bateau Bay Rd, Bateau Bay NSW 2261, Australia
hotelDescription:
Set on the South Pacific Coast, 2 km from the A49, this relaxed beachfront hotel is a 12-minute walk from Shelly Beach and 3 km from Crackneck Lookout.
 Airy cabins provide kitchens and en suite bathrooms. Some feature seating areas, flat-screen TVs and/or furnished terraces, some with ocean views. Some can sleep up to 6 guests.
 Amenities include a water park, an outdoor pool and a campground, as well as BBQ facilities and parking.

title: Two Shores Holiday Village
description: Simple cabins, some with balconies & kitchenettes, in a beachside resort with a pool & a BBQ area.
address: 25 Wilfred Barrett Dr, The Entrance North NSW 2261, Australia
hotelDescription:
This cabin-style beachside resort, set on Tuggerah Lake, is 3 km from Wyrrabalong National Park and 8 km from Norah Head Lighthouse.
 The simple cabins come in a variety of styles and feature flat-screen TVs, microwaves and minifridges. Some have shared bathrooms. Upgraded cabins add flat-screen TVs with DVD players, kitchenettes and balconies with lake views.
 Amenities consist of a pool and a covered BBQ area with grills and picnic tables.

title: Blue Lagoon Beach Resort
description: Relaxed quarters with free Wi-Fi and full kitchens, plus a pool, 6 hot tubs and tennis courts.
address: 10 Bateau Bay Rd, Bateau Bay NSW 2261, Australia
hotelDescription:
This low-key beachfront resort with clapboard cabins is 9 km from Terrigal Lagoon and 13 km from Wyrrabalong National Park.
 Rustic, beach house-style cabins with wood floors and ceilings sleep up to 6. They feature free Wi-Fi, TVs, DVD players, lounge areas and full kitchens, plus balconies or outdoor decks. They have ceiling fans but no air-conditioning. Some have whirlpool baths.
 Parking is free. Amenities include an outdoor pool (heated in winter), 6 hot tubs, barbecues, an entertainment complex and a playground. There are also tennis, basketball and volleyball courts.

title: NRMA Budgewoi Holiday Park
description: Laid-back cabins with kitchens, furnished porches & free Wi-Fi, some offering lake views.
hotelDescription:
On the tree-lined shores of Lake Munmorah, this holiday park with relaxed cabins is 7 km from the Norah Head Light lighthouse and 8 km from hiking at the Munmorah State Conservation Area.
 The modest 2-bedroom cabins are air-conditioned, and include en suite bathrooms, kitchens, free Wi-Fi and living/dining areas, as well as furnished porches, some with lake views. Most quarters have flat-screen TVs. Some upgraded cabins add whirlpool tubs.
 Amenities include picnic areas with BBQ grills, plus a kids' playground and a free shuttle bus to local nightclubs.
